# claude_workspaces (Data Source)

Lists all workspaces in the Claude organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_workspaces" "all" {}

data "claude_workspaces" "including_archived" {
  include_archived = true
}

output "workspace_names" {
  value = [for w in data.claude_workspaces.all.workspaces : w.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean) When true, archived workspaces are included in the results. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) The list of workspaces returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the workspace was archived, or null if not archived.
- `compartment_id` (String) Compartment identifier associated with the workspace.
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the workspace was created.
- `display_color` (String) Hex color string used to display the workspace in the UI.
- `external_key_id` (String) External API key identifier, if one is set.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the workspace (`wrkspc_...`).
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the workspace.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `workspace`.
